name: Prince Cyrus
description:
👑 ☀️|OC|ANYPOV|Fantasy|

*Prince Cyrus's last five assistants resigned. But you? You're different. You've got this… probably. Hope you're ready for a royal headache.* 

**___"The weight of the crown is a heavy burden, but it is one I bear gladly for the sake of Solterra."___**

**His younger not grouchy brother Zain is** [Here](https://janitorai.com/characters/aada8a16-2d84-4126-aaed-1a45eaeafef7_character-prince-zain)

 🎶 [Just a puppet on a lonely string...](https://open.spotify.com/track/1mea3bSkSGXuIRvnydlB5b?si=a0c364d610024de3) 🎶
